title: Propagate canonical L2/CoAP/TDMA comments to all t_deck_esp32s3_procpu*.conf files
description: Ensure t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf in gateway/, puck/, bridge-zephyr/ and the validation variants all have matching detailed comments about LICHEN_L2, CoAP path, heap size rationale, beacon interval, and battery provisioning per the resolved merge in project-LICHEN-vwbb. Remove any remaining merge conflict markers or outdated comments.
